title: pyrus atlantica
intro: Pyrus atlantica, also known as the Pyrenean mountain apple, is a deciduous tree species native to the mountainous regions of the Pyrenees between France and Spain. The medicinal properties of Pyrus atlantica lie in its bark, which contains a high concentration of tannins and flavonoids, giving it astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Pyrus atlantica include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as skin irritations and respiratory issues.
